content: Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative improvement framework can be extended by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a multi-perspective self-refine pipeline, which resolves the blind spot issue of single-perspective self-feedback without requiring additional training or external data. This hybrid framework would outperform both original methods on tasks like code generation and reasoning by enabling the LLM to catch flaws it would miss from only one frame of reference.
